title: Cobblemon-Modpack Binder
description: The Holder of all the Cobblemon Modpacks made by me including non generational (The Server Listen is for Cobblemon however it shows Progress for the Modpack and used for Suggestions)
body:
This is a Holder of Modpacks including the Non Generational Cobblemon Packs (In Order Christmas-Delight/Valentine Day, (Request one for Summer), Halloween then finally back to Christmas
(Open Spoilers for Summary)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**_This is where all of the Other Modpacks go once they have reached its total Download Goal of 50 for Generational types Such as Cobblemon: Red,blue, Yellow and Green, The Cobblemon Series includes that of both Client sided and Served sided mods that make your game feel like the Halloday or Gen type with Quality of life mods (Some so have Resourcepacks that are also Quality of life) [Warning this is no Recommoned for Slow PCS and its not recommoned to Download more that you think your PC can handle before you load the game check if your PC and load both Fabric and Minecraft passed 1.16.5/1.12.2]_**

</details>
(Modpack Log Update 1- Added Kanto Region Pack due to Like Goal)
(Modpack Log Update 0.0.2 Moderation required that I remove heading parts for viewers to better read the Modpack decription as it could been seen as misusage of heading)
(Modpack Log Update 0.0.1 Moderation required I give a Modpack Summary and Remove Bold from Heading)
